_comment: Sample body for POST /api/admin/tests/import — a tiny EIKEN Grade 3 practice form. Demonstrates the import shape: objective auto-graded reading items (note answer data lives under reserved payload keys 'accepted', and is_correct on options) plus one AI-graded writing task. Set rubric_id to a real rubrics.id (skill='writing') to attach the EIKEN Writing rubric; null falls back to a generic rubric.

form.title: EIKEN Grade 3 — Practice Test 1
form.title_ja: 英検3級 模擬テスト1

sections.title: Vocabulary & Grammar
sections.instructions: Choose the best word or phrase to complete each sentence.

questions.prompt: My brother is good ( ) playing the guitar.
A: How ( ) is it from here to the station?  B: About ten minutes on foot.

sections.title: Reading Comprehension
sections.instructions: Read the passage and answer the question.

groups.passage_text: Yuki likes animals very much. Every Saturday she goes to a small animal shelter near her house. She helps the staff by feeding the cats and cleaning their cages. She wants to be a vet in the future.

questions.prompt: What does Yuki do every Saturday?

options.label: B
options.content: She helps at an animal shelter.

options.label: C
options.content: She studies to be a doctor.

questions.prompt: In the future, Yuki wants to be a ______.

groups.prompt: Your friend asks: 'What did you do during summer vacation?' Write a reply.
